raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill aims to address predatory practices of anti-abortion ‘crisis pregnancy centers.’",
    "Crisis pregnancy centers masquerade as health care centers to lure in pregnant people seeking care.",
    "These centers mislead and pressure patients about their pregnancy options.",
    "The bill will clarify that those marketing themselves as providing reproductive care cannot mislead prospective patients about whether or not they provide abortion services.",
    "Crisis pregnancy centers do not meet the same standards and practices as actual medical clinics, including not following HIPAA regulations.",
    "Crisis pregnancy centers use extensive, strategically placed advertising targeting abortion-seekers to lure them in.",
    "Many crisis pregnancy centers offer ultrasounds and pregnancy tests to appear legitimate.",
    "Women seeking abortion care at these centers receive misinformation about abortion risks and sexual health.",
    "The results of pregnancy tests at crisis pregnancy centers can be misrepresented to coerce abortion-seekers into continuing their pregnancy.",
    "Crisis pregnancy centers limit reproductive freedom by lying about their services."
  ]
}
```
